explanation: Full learning cycle applied. Epsilon-greedy exploitation boosted high-CTR templates (weight ×100) and retired poor performers (weight 0). Timing windows re-derived from observed CTR/engagement/uninstall composite scores instead of GMM activity clusters. Notification frequency guarded by uninstall-rate safety cap.
